description:
A DeepSeek-native coding agent, for your terminal.

Reasonix talks straight to api.deepseek.com. The loop is append-only, engineered around DeepSeek's byte-stable prefix cache — long sessions hold 90%+ cache hit and input-token cost collapses to ~1/5. Terminal-first, leave it running.
What's Changed
- fix(desktop): reduce restored history and transcript lag by @GTC2080 in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4443
- build(deps): bump the go group with 3 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4378
- chore(deps): bump the npm group across 1 directory with 2 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4379
- fix(desktop): open channel sessions read-only by @ferstar in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4446
- Fix desktop tool diff previews / 修复桌面端工具 diff 预览 by @GTC2080 in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4479
- feat(desktop): add ⌘+W / Ctrl+W shortcut to close the active tab by @ttmouse in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4298
- feat(desktop): expand \yng/\young to KaTeX-compatible Young diagrams by @lightfront in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4216
- feat(cli):termux 启动 cli 前清除终端历史信息 by @nostalgia296 in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4511
- Enhance model switcher search and provider labels / 增强模型切换器搜索与服务商标签 by @ttmouse in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4139
- Integrate skill discovery fixes / 集成技能发现修复 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4510
- Fix desktop model switcher provider scope merge / 修复桌面模型切换器配置作用域合并 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4492
- Sanitize malformed MCP required schemas / 清洗异常 MCP required schema by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4469
- Require approval for awk and sed bash commands / 要求 awk 和 sed Bash 命令审批 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4452
- Fix desktop app icon safe area / 修复桌面应用图标安全区 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4438
- Show context cache hit rate with decimals / 使用小数显示上下文缓存命中率 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4502
- Ignore background performance pressure / 忽略后台性能压力误报 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4444
- Keep new tab button beside tabs / 固定新建会话按钮贴近标签页 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4493
- Fix desktop welcome clipping on fullscreen resize / 修复桌面端全屏后欢迎页裁剪 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4503
- Fix workspace changes refresh per tab / 修复改动列表按会话刷新 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4501
- Unify desktop keyboard shortcuts and help / 统一桌面快捷键设置与帮助 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4515
- 增强后台 job 健壮性与可观测性 by @lifu963 in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4562
- agent: align subagent tool surface with runtime by @lifu963 in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4514
- Integrate clear context telemetry fixes / 集成清空上下文与统计面板修复 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4329
- fix(config): 修复模型选择保存后被官方默认模型覆盖的问题 by @whale-fall-ouo in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4533
- feat(desktop): 工具审批卡片添加左右键切换和 Enter 确认 by @whale-fall-ouo in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4538
- Suppress Wails non-file drag rejection / 抑制 Wails 非文件拖拽误报 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4450
- feat(agent): preserve failure context with configurable compaction retention / 保留失败上下文并支持可配置压缩保留策略 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4392
- chore(deps): address esbuild audit advisory / 修复 esbuild 审计告警 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4478
- Support per-model vision model capabilities / 支持按模型声明识图能力 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4571
- Fix runtime cancellation state and stop controls / 修复运行取消状态与停止控制 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4574
- Add desktop app icons / 添加桌面应用图标 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4576
- Default desktop appearance to automatic Graphite / 默认桌面外观为自动石墨 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4578
- Fix settings shortcuts navigation and key display / 修复设置快捷键入口与按键显示 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4581
- Add user message actions / 添加用户消息操作 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4577
- Reapply desktop session runtime commit with valid author email by @lifu963 in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4586
- Remove bundled MCP servers / 移除内置 MCP 服务 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4599
- Fix global config path migration / 修复全局配置路径迁移 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4604
- feat(ui): 优化项目树左侧栏视觉样式 by @ttmouse in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4589
- Add settings preference metrics / 新增设置偏好埋点 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4619
- Ignore ResizeObserver loop notices in crash reporting / 忽略 ResizeObserver 循环通知的崩溃上报 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4622
- Check nested ResizeObserver errors / 检查嵌套 ResizeObserver 错误 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4623
- Fix ACP Zed integration gaps / 修复 ACP 的 Zed 集成缺口 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4624
- Allow manual stable npm releases / 支持手动稳定 npm 发布 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4625
- Fix MCP reconnect and stdio call timeout / 修复 MCP 重连和 stdio 调用超时 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4628
- Fix app icon full-canvas background / 修复应用图标全画布背景 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4613
- Restore saved session model on resume / 恢复会话时保留原模型 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4631
- Surface credential source diagnostics / 显示凭据来源诊断 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4630
- Make bare reasonix start sessions / 让 reasonix 直接启动会话 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4632
- Fix default interactive CLI routing / 修复默认交互 CLI 路由 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4634
- Refresh docs site install and desktop guidance / 刷新文档站点安装与桌面端说明 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4636
- Fix settings capability loading / 修复设置页能力加载延迟 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4635
- Add desktop updater and settings refinements / 增加桌面更新与设置优化 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/4637
Full Changelog: https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/compare/desktop-v1.8.1...desktop-v1.9.0
